title: Spec / constraints
description: Hard limits the factory must respect: budget caps, deadlines, accessibility/performance targets, compliance, do-not-use lists. See ARCHITECTURE.md §9.

max_tokens_total.description: Hard cap on total tokens the factory may spend on this project. Default per ARCHITECTURE §9.1: 5000000.

max_dollar_cost.description: Hard cap on USD cost. Auto-stop at 100%, Level 3 escalation at 95%, Level 2 at 75%.

max_iterations.description: Hard cap on orchestrator iterations. Prevents infinite loops.

max_duration_hours.description: Wall-clock cap. 48h is the V1 default.

max_consecutive_failures.description: Number of consecutive agent failures after which the factory auto-stops. Healing attempts count as one chain.

deadlines.description: Optional client-facing deadlines. The factory does not enforce them, but the dashboard surfaces them.

min_wcag_level.description: Minimum WCAG level the accessibility-auditor enforces.

additional_requirements.description: Free-form a11y requirements beyond WCAG (e.g. "funguje s NVDA na Edge", "plně použitelné na klávesnici").

compliance.description: Compliance regimes the site must satisfy. GDPR is the default for CZ/EU clients.

data_residency.description: Where data may live. "on-premise" forces the architect agent toward Payload over Sanity.

do_not_use.description: Vendors, libraries or patterns the project must not use. Examples: "Google Analytics" (privacy), "Comic Sans" (taste), "react-slick" (a11y).

ai_disclosure_to_client.description: Whether the client has been told the build is AI-assisted. PRD US-IN-007 / Wave 6 step 6.1 expects true.
